Why I Fit

Content Creation & Reels

I've independently produced 95 posts of Instagram content — carousels, reels, stories — achieving 890K average views per post with zero paid promotion. I understand what makes short-form content stop the scroll.

Brand Campaign Execution

Delivered 9 paid brand collaborations end-to-end — from briefing to publishing — with a top campaign hitting 2M reach for Motogenius. I translate marketing objectives into creative that converts.

AI-Assisted Content Production

Actively use ChatGPT, Canva AI, and Midjourney to accelerate ideation and content iteration. I stay ahead of platform trends and leverage AI to maintain quality at speed and scale.

Multi-Platform Strategy

Deep understanding of Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook content formats, algorithms, and audience behavior. Skilled at repurposing content across platforms while preserving brand tone and visual consistency.

About

Who I Am

A content creator and digital marketing professional with 4+ years of experience across brand communication, campaign execution, and audience growth. I blend strategic thinking with hands-on creative production — from scripting and filming to editing and publishing.

My work spans reels, carousels, short-form video, and brand storytelling — with a proven track record of building genuinely engaged communities. I understand both the creative and the commercial side of content.

I'm comfortable working at pace, managing multiple campaigns simultaneously, and adapting tone and format for different brand identities and audiences. Results-first, always.
